'''鈭歯g-t-th-v''' ('''kangatthevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zipline|zipline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zipline|zipline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-t-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| kangatthevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingathevoko|thingathevoko]] || [[word:jingathevoko|jingathevoko]] || [[word:shingathevoko|shingathevoko]] || [[word:kingathevoko|kingathevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungathevoko|thuthungathevoko]] || [[word:jujungathevoko|jujungathevoko]] || [[word:shushungathevoko|shushungathevoko]] || [[word:kukungathevoko|kukungathevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungathevoko|thungathevoko]] || [[word:jungathevoko|jungathevoko]] || [[word:shungathevoko|shungathevoko]] || [[word:kungathevoko|kungathevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungathevoko|thungathevoko]] || [[word:jungathevoko|jungathevoko]] || [[word:shungathevoko|shungathevoko]] || [[word:kungathevoko|kungathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengathevoko|thengathevoko]] || [[word:jengathevoko|jengathevoko]] || [[word:shengathevoko|shengathevoko]] || [[word:kengathevoko|kengathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongathevoko|thothongathevoko]] || [[word:jojongathevoko|jojongathevoko]] || [[word:shoshongathevoko|shoshongathevoko]] || [[word:kokongathevoko|kokongathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongathevoko|thongathevoko]] || [[word:jongathevoko|jongathevoko]] || [[word:shongathevoko|shongathevoko]] || [[word:kongathevoko|kongathevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongathevoko|thongathevoko]] || [[word:jongathevoko|jongathevoko]] || [[word:shongathevoko|shongathevoko]] || [[word:kongathevoko|kongathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngathevoko|th忙ngathevoko]] || [[word:j忙ngathevoko|j忙ngathevoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngathevoko|sh忙ngathevoko]] || [[word:k忙ngathevoko|k忙ngathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangathevoko|thathangathevoko]] || [[word:jajangathevoko|jajangathevoko]] || [[word:shashangathevoko|shashangathevoko]] || [[word:kakangathevoko|kakangathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangathevoko|thangathevoko]] || [[word:jangathevoko|jangathevoko]] || [[word:shangathevoko|shangathevoko]] || [[word:kangathevoko|kangathevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangathevoko|thangathevoko]] || [[word:jangathevoko|jangathevoko]] || [[word:shangathevoko|shangathevoko]] || [[word:kangathevoko|kangathevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
